name: OpenClaw
summary: Summary The fal provider used raw fetches for both provider API traffic and returned image download URLs instead of the existing SSRF-guarded fetch path.
description:
Summary


The fal provider used raw fetches for both provider API traffic and returned image download URLs instead of the existing
SSRF-guarded fetch path.


Impact


A malicious or compromised fal relay could make the gateway fetch internal URLs and expose metadata or internal service
responses through the image pipeline.


Affected Component


extensions/fal/image-generation-provider.ts


Fixed Versions


- Affected: <= 2026.3.24

- Patched: >= 2026.3.28

- Latest stable 2026.3.28 contains the fix.


Fix


Fixed by commit 80d1e8a11a (fal: guard image fetches).
suggestion: Upgrade openclaw to >= 2026.3.28 or later. Fixed by commit 80d1e8a11a (fal: guard image fetches).
